name: Premium Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: High-quality wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity, 30-hour battery life, and premium sound quality. Perfect for professional use and everyday listening.

name: Ultra-Slim Portable Laptop Stand
description: Adjustable aluminum laptop stand with ergonomic design. Supports laptops up to 17 inches. Lightweight and portable for travel. Non-slip rubber feet prevent sliding.

name: Professional USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: Multi-port USB-C hub with 4K HDMI output, USB 3.0 ports, SD card reader, and 100W power delivery. Compatible with MacBook, Dell XPS, and other USB-C devices.

name: Ergonomic Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB
description: Premium mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting, programmable keys, and tactile switches. Ideal for gaming and professional typing.

name: Compact 4K Webcam with Auto-focus
description: Crystal clear 4K webcam with 90-degree wide-angle lens and automatic focus. Built-in stereo microphone for high-quality video conferencing and streaming.

name: Premium Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: Precision wireless gaming mouse with 16,000 DPI sensor, programmable buttons, and 70-hour battery life. Lightweight ergonomic design for extended gaming sessions.

name: High-Performance Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast portable solid-state drive with 1TB capacity, USB 3.1 Gen 2 connectivity, and rugged aluminum enclosure. Transfer speeds up to 1050 MB/s.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging
description: Touch-control LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and color temperature. Features built-in USB charging port and memory function for personalized settings.

name: Professional Studio Monitor Speakers Pair
description: Powered studio monitor speakers with flat frequency response for accurate audio reproduction. Perfect for music production, mixing, and professional audio work.

name: Wireless Charging Pad Fast 15W
description: Fast wireless charging pad compatible with all Qi-enabled devices. Non-slip surface and LED indicator light. Supports standard and fast charging modes.

name: Premium Phone Screen Protector Pack
description: Pack of 3 tempered glass screen protectors with 9H hardness rating. Easy installation with alignment frame included. Perfect fit for popular smartphone models.

name: Professional Cable Management Kit
description: Complete cable management kit with adhesive clips, velcro straps, and sleeves. Organize your desk and hide messy cables for a clean, professional appearance.

name: Ultra-Bright LED Video Light Panel
description: Professional video light with adjustable brightness and color temperature (2700K-6500K). Bi-color LED panel for photography and videography. Ultra-thin design.

name: Portable Power Bank 30000mAh
description: High-capacity power bank with 30000mAh battery, dual USB-C ports, and fast charging support. LED display shows remaining battery. Lightweight and compact design.

name: Premium Phone Car Mount Dashboard
description: Secure dashboard phone mount with 360-degree rotation and adjustable grip. Compatible with all smartphone sizes. Strong suction cup holds firmly on any smooth surface.

name: Professional Smartphone Gimbal Stabilizer
description: 3-axis smartphone gimbal with intuitive controls and smooth stabilization. Supports phones up to 210g. Object tracking and panorama modes included.

name: Compact Portable Projector 1080p
description: Lightweight projector with native 1080p resolution and 300 ANSI lumens brightness. Built-in speaker, HDMI and USB connectivity. Perfect for presentations and entertainment.

name: Wireless Bluetooth Speaker Waterproof
description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 20-hour battery life and 360-degree sound. IPX7 water resistance perfect for outdoor use. Rugged and durable design.

name: Premium USB-A to USB-C Cable 2-Pack
description: High-quality USB cable 2-pack with fast charging and data transfer support. Durable braided nylon exterior and reinforced connectors. 2 meters length each.

name: Ergonomic Vertical Gaming Mouse
description: Vertical ergonomic mouse designed to reduce hand strain. 8 programmable buttons, 7200 DPI sensor, and wireless connectivity. Comfortable for long gaming sessions.

name: Professional Ring Light LED 18 inch
description: 18-inch LED ring light with tripod stand, phone holder, and remote control. Adjustable brightness and color temperature. Ideal for streaming, photography, and makeup.

name: Premium Laptop Cooling Pad with Fans
description: Laptop cooling pad with dual silent fans and USB hub functionality. Supports laptops up to 17 inches. Helps prevent overheating during gaming and heavy workload.

name: Portable Bluetooth Turntable Vinyl Player
description: Portable turntable with built-in Bluetooth speakers and USB playback capability. Supports vinyl records and includes headphone jack. Compact design for any room.

name: Ultra-Slim Protective Phone Case Clear
description: Crystal clear protective phone case with shock-absorbing bumpers. Slim design that doesn't add bulk. Precise cutouts for camera and ports. Wireless charging compatible.

name: Professional Microphone USB Streaming Condenser
description: USB condenser microphone with cardioid pattern, ideal for streaming, podcasting, and recording. Built-in pop filter and tripod stand. Plug-and-play connectivity with no drivers needed.
